---
title: "Caroline Wabisane"
---

## Caroline Wabisane

**Dates:** (b. <i>c</i>.1845)

### Description

Christian convert

### Biography

A native of New Caledonia, she was engaged to George Siapo (d.1853).  She was christened after Caroline Abraham and called Carry; she married a Maori named Simeona. [<i>Life of John Coleridge Patteson</i> 196, 284].

### Letters

- Letter from June 9, 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
